zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Constance Poynings於1408年9月20日出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛時，她的父親Sir Hugh de Poynings27歲，母親Eleanor Welles19歲。她於大約1426年與Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton and Warminster結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1442年享年34歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特努尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Constance Poynings于1408年9月20日出生在英国英格兰哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛时，她的父亲Sir Hugh de Poynings27岁，母亲Eleanor Welles19岁。她于大约1426年与Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton and Warminster结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1442年享年34岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特努尼。

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Constance Poynings was born on 20 September 1408, in Old Basing, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Hugh de Poynings, was 27 and her mother, Eleanor Welles, was 19. She married Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton and Warminster about 1426. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1442, at the age of 34, and was buried in Nunney, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Constance Poynings est née le 20 septembre 1408, à Old Basing, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Hugh de Poynings, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Welles, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton and Warminster environ 1426. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1442, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Nunney, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.Basing, Hampshire, England: Old Basing, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Constance Poynings am 20. September 1408 in Old Basing, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Hugh de Poynings 27 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Welles 19. Sie hat um 1426 Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton and Warminster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1442 im Alter von 34 Jahren und wurde in Nunney, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Constance Poynings è nata il il 20 settembre 1408 nel Old Basing, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Hugh de Poynings, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Welles, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton and Warminster circa 1426. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1442, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolta a Nunney, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Constance Poyningsが1408年9月20日にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアオルド バシングで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh de Poyningsは27歳，母Eleanor Wellesは19歳であった。約1426年にSir Henry de Grene of Drayton and Warminsterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1442年に34歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトヌニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Constance Poynings(이)가 1408년 9월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 드 바징에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh de Poynings(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Welles(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1426년 Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton and Warminster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1442년 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 누니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Constance Poynings nasceu em 20 de setembro de 1408, em Old Basing, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Hugh de Poynings, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Welles, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton and Warminster aproximadamente 1426. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1442, com 34 anos, e foi sepultada em Nunney, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ro.Basing, Hampshire, England: Old Basing, Hampshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Constance Poynings родилась 20 сентября 1408 г. в местности олд басинг, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Hugh de Poynings было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Welles, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton and Warminster около 1426 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1442 г. в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности нунни, сомирсет, Англия.
